Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanction
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on FRI-JUN-21-2013: Patrick J. Connolly, Esq. of Utrecht & Lenvin, LLP (415.357.0600) appearing for TELEGRAPH HILL PROPERTIES, INC., plaintiff / opposing party;
George M. Lee, Esq. of Seiler, Epstein, Ziegler & Applegate, LLP (415.979.0500) appearing for
PHOENIX RABBIT, LLC, defendant / moving party

HEARING - R U L I N G: Defendant PHOENIX RABBIT, LLC'S Motion for Terminating Sanctions is GRANTED against Plaintiff TELEGRAPH HILL PROPERTIES, INC. for failure to comply with the Court's Order filed May 13, 2013, which required the personal appearance of WB Coyle at his deposition on June 4, 2013. Pursuant to C.C.P. 2023.030(d)(2), an order shall issue that further proceedings in the instant matter are stayed until the May 13th discovery Order is obeyed, to wit: WB Coyle appears personally for his deposition, and such deposition is completed on or before a date certain to be submitted to the Court. Defendant's Request for Sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $6,985. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Protective Order
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on FRI-JUN-21-2013: Patrick J. Connolly, Esq. of Utrecht & Lenvin, LLP (415.357.0600) appearing for TELEGRAPH HILL PROPERTIES, INC., plaintiff / opposing party;
George M. Lee, Esq. of Seiler, Epstein, Ziegler & Applegate, LLP (415.979.0500) appearing for
PHOENIX RABBIT, LLC, defendant / moving party

HEARING - R U L I N G: Defendant PHOENIX RABBIT, LLC'S Motion for Protective Order is GRANTED. Pursuant to C.C.P. 2025.420(b)(5), an Order shall issue that the depositions noticed and scheduled by Plaintiff TELEGRAPH HILL PROPERTIES, INC. shall be held in abeyance until Plaintiff complies with the May 13th discovery Order, to wit: WB Coyle appears personally for his deposition, and such deposition is completed on or before a date certain to be submitted to the Court. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
